title: Zoetis Inc. (ZTS) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) valuation of Zoetis based on free cash flow generation and stable growth in the animal health sector.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 3.0% based on recent trailing twelve months, reflecting steady but mature end markets.
assumptions.fcfGrowthRate: 5.0% projected over the next 10 years, assuming margin expansion and operating leverage given high ROE (66%).
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.5% representing long-term GDP growth, suitable for a mature, industry-leading healthcare company.
assumptions.discountRate: 8.0% calculated using a standard WACC approach with a beta of 0.95, reflecting the low-risk nature of the animal health business.
